name: Fort Marlborough
description: A British fort (1710-1726) carved into the rock above the idyllic Cala de Sant Esteve, facing the Castell de Sant Felip. A theatricalised guided tour through underground galleries and a moat, with the mouth of Maó harbour as a backdrop.

highlights: descend into the underground galleries with a light and sound staging
follow the rock-cut moat up to the high point above the cove
take in the views of the mouth of Maó harbour and the Castell de Sant Felip opposite
